analysis.name: Mask Network
analysis.summary: MASK在XRPL DEX上交易，流动性极低（13美元），24小时涨幅4.26%，但成交量仅1.47美元，实际无意义。基本面有Lens Protocol接管等利好，但链上交易环境极差，风险极高。

recommendation.invalidation: 流动性提升至合理水平（如>10万美元）且成交量活跃

catalysts: 2026年1月接管Lens Protocol，成为新管理员
2024年3月推出质押计划并预期空投，曾推动价格上涨30%

latestNews.title: Mask Network will become the new administrator of Lens Protocol
latestNews.reason: 接管知名社交协议Lens，增强生态影响力

latestNews.title: Mask Network announced the launch of a staking plan, and the expected airdrop pushed the currency price up by nearly 30%
latestNews.reason: 质押和空投预期曾带动短期上涨

latestNews.title: Mask Network acquires Mastodon server Pawoo.net
latestNews.reason: 收购去中心化社交服务器，但已是2022年旧闻

fundamentals: Mask Network是连接Web2到Web3的桥梁，核心为点对点加密消息应用
总供应量1亿枚，已全部流通，无通胀压力
当前市值约55058美元（XRPL上），远低于CoinMarketCap排名521的3885万美元，说明XRPL上交易的是非官方代币或流动性极差
项目曾获Binance Labs、Animoca Brands等投资
marketRead: XRPL DEX上MASK/XRP对24小时涨幅4.26%，但流动性仅13.26美元，成交量1.47美元，实际无交易意义
价格4.81 XRP，但无法反映真实市场，因为流动性极低，任何大单都会剧烈滑点
CoinMarketCap上MASK价格0.3885美元，24小时涨39.5%，但XRPL上价格与主流市场脱节
risks: XRPL DEX流动性极低（13美元），存在操纵和无法成交风险
该交易对可能非官方代币，存在合约风险
MASK整体市值较小，波动性大
新闻催化多为旧闻（2024、2026年初），缺乏近期新鲜利好
watchlist: XRPL上该交易对流动性是否增加
MASK在主流CEX上的价格和成交量变化
Lens Protocol接管后的实际进展
是否有新的质押或空投活动
sourceNotes: XRPL DEX数据来自DexScreener，流动性极低，数据可靠性差
新闻来源包括Google News聚合，部分为旧闻
CoinMarketCap数据与XRPL数据不一致，需注意区分

profile.name: Mask Network
profile.description: Mask Network is the core product of Dimension, which is positioned to become the bridge that connects internet users from Web 2.0 to Web 3.0. The foundational technology of Mask Network is a peer-to-peer encrypted messaging application, with new functions continuously being created around this foundation. We at Mask Network are strong believers in the ownership economy. People should own what they produce, people should own their data, their attention and the virtual space they choose to contribute to. Mask Network integrates decentralized social messaging, borderless payment network, and decentralized file storage and sharing to provide a safe and convenient portal for users to jump right into the continent of decentralized finance and then the new world of Web 3.0.
